problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Liquid crystal elastomer actuation may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
